summary: Tested Showcase Approvals page and Contact Photo Gallery bug fixes. Backend: 13/13 tests pass - GET /api/showcase/pending/{user_id} returns 40 entries with 39 having relative customer_photo URLs (/api/images/...), DELETE /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos validates photo_url and photo_type correctly. Frontend: Showcase Approvals page loads correctly showing '40 PENDING POSTS' header with images loading (solid color test images - blue, red, green), Reject and Approve buttons visible. Contact photo gallery shows grid view with profile badge and set-as-profile overlay buttons, full-screen viewer shows delete button (red trash) and navigation counter.
critical_code_review_comments: showcase.py: Correctly returns relative URLs (/api/images/...) for customer_photo in pending entries - 39 of 40 entries have photos
showcase-approvals.tsx: Uses expo-image Image component with resolveUrl() for proper WebP handling on web
contacts.py: DELETE /{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos endpoint validates photo_url (400 if missing) and photo_type (400 if invalid)
[id].tsx: Photo gallery has delete button (data-testid='delete-photo-btn') and set-as-profile button (data-testid='set-as-profile-btn') in full-screen viewer
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 40 pending showcase entries and API Test contact
context_for_next_testing_agent: Showcase Approvals page at /settings/showcase-approvals shows 40 pending entries with images loading correctly (test images are solid color blocks). Contact photo gallery on /contact/69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1 shows 2 photos with profile badge on first, set-as-profile overlay on second. Full-screen viewer has delete button (red) and grid button. Backend returns relative URLs for all photos.

backend.GET /api/showcase/pending/{user_id}: PASS - returns 40 entries, 39 with customer_photo URLs starting with /api/images/
backend.GET /api/showcase/user/{user_id}: PASS - returns showcase entries with relative photo URLs
backend.DELETE /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_: PASS - validates photo_url (400 if missing), photo_type (400 if invalid), accepts profile/history/congrats/birthday

frontend.Showcase images loading: PASS - images display (solid color test images), not blank/grey boxes
frontend.Reject/Approve buttons visible: PASS - each entry has Reject (red) and Approve (green) buttons
frontend.Contact photo gallery grid view: PASS - shows 2 photos with profile badge and set-as-profile overlay
frontend.Contact photo gallery full-screen viewer: PASS - shows delete button (red trash), grid button, photo counter (1 of 2)

screenshots.showcase_approvals_page: .screenshots/showcase_approvals_page.png - Shows 40 PENDING POSTS with blue/red/green test images loading
screenshots.gallery_grid_view: .screenshots/gallery_grid_final.png - Shows 2 photo tiles with profile badge and set-as-profile overlay
screenshots.gallery_fullscreen_viewer: .screenshots/gallery_fullscreen_viewer.png - Shows 1 of 2, Profile Photo label, grid button, red delete button
